FX.title: [USD/JPY] UP: Risk-On Macro Backdrop Supports Bullish Bias; Technical Structure Remains Constructive
tldr_points: Risk-on sentiment dominates on Trump-Iran de-escalation and strong US equity momentum
Tariff escalation on European autos strengthens USD relative to EUR,间接ly supporting USD/JPY
Technical structure shows intact uptrend with MA20 acting as dynamic support
FX.excerpt: USD/JPY positioned for upside as risk appetite surges on Iran de-escalation and strong US equities.
FX.comment: Risk-on macro thesis supported by technical uptrend structure; buy dips toward MA20

tldr_points: Tech earnings exceeding estimates driving market

CRYPTO.title: [BTC/USD] UP: Regulatory Clarity and Institutional Adoption Bolster Bullish Thesis
